'''Gailid''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] tax collector, assistant to [[Mosep Binneed/Legends|Mosep Binneed]], the [[Nimbanel/Legends|Nimbanel]] accountant in charge of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's]] affairs in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]].

==Biography==
During his times in [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]], Gailid became close to the skiff guard [[Barada/Legends|Barada]]. He was in the process of learning how to repair the skiff's [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] when Jabba demanded they take [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and the other Rebels out to the [[Great Pit of Carkoon/Legends|Great Pit of Carkoon]] to be executed.

During the [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon]], Gailid was aboard the second [[Bantha-II cargo skiff/Legends|skiff]] and was killed in the battle not by the [[Sarlacc/Legends|Sarlacc]], but by the blade of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Luke Skywalker's green lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].
[[File:Gailid_SWI_143.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Gailid]]
